description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a dark gable roof and light gray exterior walls, surrounded by a wooden privacy fence. The front yard features two large leafy trees, a driveway with a white car, and a sidewalk leading to the main entrance. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a pool, enclosed by the same wooden fencing. The house has a prominent garage attached to one side, and the landscaping includes a row of tall, narrow shrubs along one side of the property. A police car is parked on the street in front, emphasizing the urban residential context. Windows are arranged in a practical, asymmetrical pattern, and the main entryway is simple, with a small porch and steps.
description: A single-story suburban house with a dark gable roof, gray walls, fenced yard, driveway, and backyard pool. The property features trees, shrubs, and a simple front entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, two large trees, sidewalk, and police car on the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long wooden fence, row of tall shrubs, and backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, pool, and wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the driveway, police car, and tall shrubs lining the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front entry with a small porch, steps, and a single door, no elaborate decorative elements.
